verifiedObservations.fact: Small-logo loading is invoked during realization, theme changes, and display-name/small-logo visibility refresh.
The theme-aware path requests tile image resource kind raw value 5, obtains branding options from ThemeManager, and loads a bitmap asynchronously through LogoLoader.
The alternate path asks GetImageResolverForTileItem for a resolver, attempts a cached image first, then falls back to asynchronous cached-image loading.
SmallLogo height, width, margin, and stretch delegate to per-frame metrics/state objects rather than literal TileViewModel constants.
App-list logo and logo-background getters return independently stored ImageSource and Brush properties; a universal fixed gray backplate is not implied.
Changing AppItemLogoType triggers realization only when the requested type differs; raw values 1, 2, and 3 map to internal LogoType values 2, 3, and 4.
App-list realization has a theme-aware UnifiedTile/LogoLoader path and a legacy LogoLoaderUTM path; the theme-aware path uses ThemeManager app-list options and AppItemMetrics dimensions.
GetImageResolverForTileItem constructs LogoLoaderUTM unless a process-global resolver override is installed; asset precedence is therefore inside LogoLoaderUTM rather than this factory.
LogoLoaderUTM checks a size- and content-type-specific StartVisualCache entry first. A cache miss falls back to ITileDataVisual.GetLogoAsync and writes the resulting bitmap back to the visual cache.
App-list theme-aware realization requests TileAssetImageSize raw value 0; tile branding small-logo loading requests raw value 5.

unresolved: source precedence inside ITileDataVisual.GetLogoAsync beyond cache-first behavior
